texto: We are Darwin’s confetti. Some of us fall on bare rock. No matter how good you are, you can fail spectacularly. Just because you were at the wrong place at the wrong time. Or just because of some fatal flaw. Nothing to do with talent.
explicacao: Citação de Ingela Bohm sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “We are Darwin’s confetti. Some of us fall on bare rock. No matter how good you are, you can fail …” articula sucesso, failure, fate em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como fate e music.

frase_original: We are Darwin’s confetti. Some of us fall on bare rock. No matter how good you are, you can fail spectacularly. Just because you were at the wrong place at the wrong time. Or just because of some fatal flaw. Nothing to do with talent.

texto: Ribs closing on his heart, Will battled internal sirens whose song he couldn’t yet decipher. During his childhood, ‘sin’ had been such an abstract word. It denoted getting your Sunday best dirty and torn, or lying to have your brother punished for things you’d done yourself. But now, on the cusp of adulthood, the word seemed to grow and change, to acquire terrifying shades of darkness. He was beginning to understand that there was more to it. That there were things the human body longed for that were infinitely worse than playing in mud and telling fibs.
explicacao: Citação de Ingela Bohm sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Ribs closing on his heart, Will battled internal sirens whose song he couldn’t yet decipher. Duri…” articula amor, coming-of-age, shakespeare em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e reflexao-noturna.

texto: By the time you have a platform for saying what you want, you’ve already become part of the system. It’s how it works.
